human_actions_pending.action: Decide on SIEM push automation milestone scope
human_actions_pending.context: User confirmed direction (SIEM push automation) but planning not initiated. Target SIEM not decided — options: Elasticsearch remote, Splunk HEC, generic webhook, syslog/CEF.

decisions.decision: Filigran hosted Import Document AI ruled out permanently
decisions.rationale: Sends documents to importdoc.ariane.filigran.io — violates data sovereignty constraint. On-prem version requires private Filigran credentials + 8GB VRAM min.

decisions.decision: qwen2.5:72b recommended over llama3.3:70b for production extraction
decisions.rationale: Qwen 2.5 family benchmarks higher on structured JSON extraction tasks specifically; both require ~40GB VRAM Q4.

decisions.decision: README.md is now the primary project document (Spanish)
decisions.rationale: System design doc demoted to technical reference; README covers architecture, functions, competitive differentiation, hardware, scalability.

next_action: Start SIEM push automation milestone: /gsd-new-milestone. First clarify target SIEM (Elasticsearch remote vs Splunk HEC vs generic webhook) before planning.
context_notes: Stack fully running. Working tree clean at 9c2633c. Documentation now comprehensive in Spanish. Next natural step is the SIEM push automation milestone — user confirmed interest but target SIEM endpoint not yet chosen. CVE connector still ingesting 2026 data (non-blocking, background).
